sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Check what changed after moving into the blue square
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
print("All non-background nodes:")
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] not in ['w', 'P']:
        print(f"  id={n['id']}, color={n['color']}, boundary={n['boundary']}, pixels={n['pixels']}, children={n['children']}")

# Check the left blue square specifically
for n in nodes:
    if n['color'] == 'c' and n['boundary'][0][0] == 28:
        print(f"\nLeft frame: id={n['id']}, children={n['children']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
